Covers QuerySettingDef registration, SET grammar (Set.g4 lexer mode + setCommand parser rule), EsqlStatement settings collection, precedence rules (SET > request param > cluster-default), SettingsValidationContext, telemetry per-setting, capability gating per setting key, the cross-references to esql-set-review, esql-unmapped-fields-review, and the approximation / change-point setting hooks.
